pages.title: A Spectacular Find
pages.text: Connect Deepslate Coal Ore to your Heart Tree.

pages.title: Reward
pages.text: Gain a birch sapling. It counts as a descendant of your heart log. You still cannot absorb other birch trees. (Craft them into planks to avoid accidental placement)$(br)$(br)All deepslate coal ore blocks connected to your heart log now count as valid connection blocks.
